name: Kahlua
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the coffee, sugar, and boiling water in a saucepan.
2. Heat gently and stir until all the ingredients are dissolved.
3. Do not bring the mixture to a boil.
4. Add half of the vanilla bean (cut lengthwise).
5. Mix all ingredients thoroughly in a ½ gallon container (a glass one left over from apple cider works well).
6. Store the mixture in a dark place for at least one month.
7. Once ready, pour into decanters or small glass cocktail bottles to serve as Christmas presents.
